name: Microsoft Security, Compliance, and Identity Fundamentals

questions.text: While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must verify explicitly in Zero Trust. Which action is appropriate?

options.text: Layered controls across identity, network, data
Disable logging (not recommended for production workloads)

questions.explanation: Zero Trust assumes breach and verifies every request.

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to single sign-on for cloud apps. Which solution is BEST?
questions.explanation: Entra ID provides SSO and identity governance.
